name: Guerrini Chicken Wings
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix salt, cornstarch, garlic, flour, eggs, soy sauce, sugar, toasted sesame seeds, and green onions.
2. Add chicken wings to the mixture and marinate overnight in the refrigerator, turning occasionally to coat evenly.
3. Heat oil in a deep fryer or heavy pot to 375°F (190°C).
4. Using a slotted spoon, carefully place marinated chicken wings into the hot oil.
5. Fry until golden brown, about 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally to ensure even cooking.
6. Remove from oil and drain on paper towels. Serve hot.
